message:
Add zlib decompression support (gunzip, inflate, inflateZlib)

- Add wasm_zlib.zig with gzip/zlib/raw deflate decompression using Zig's std.compress.flate
- Add native JS bindings for __edgebox_gunzip, __edgebox_inflate, __edgebox_inflate_zlib
- Support Uint8Array and ArrayBuffer input for binary data handling
- Compression (gzip/deflate) not yet implemented due to Zig 0.15 API issues
